titles.title: Come, now is the time to worship

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Come, now is the time to worship Come, now is the time To give your heart Come, just as you are to worship Come, just as you are Before your God Come

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: One day every Tongue will confess You are God One day every knee will bow Still the greatest treasure Remains for those Who gladly choose You now

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Come, now is the time to worship Come, now is the time To give your heart Come, just as you are to worship Come, just as you are Before your God Come

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: One day every Tongue will confess You are God One day every knee will bow Still the greatest treasure Remains for those Who gladly choose You now

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: One day every Tongue will confess You are God One day every knee will bow Still the greatest treasure Remains for those Who gladly choose You now

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: One day every Tongue will confess You are God One day every knee will bow Still the greatest treasure Remains for those Who gladly choose You now

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Come, now is the time to worship Come, now is the time To give your heart Come, just as you are to worship Come, just as you are Before your God Come Come Come Just as you are Come Come
